title: Possibility to open item page on a sharable link
excerpt:
Hi, 
If you share a board with external persons via sharable link, it is not possible to Open the Item Page in order to see more information (updates, checklists, etc.). I would find this feature very useful. 
BR, Tom

posts.author: thomas_greif (Thomas Greif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

If you share a board with external persons via sharable link, it is not possible to Open the Item Page in order to see more information (updates, checklists, etc.). I would find this feature very useful.

BR, Tom
